use_cases: Displaying a branded 404 error page when page not found
Replacing default browser 404 errors with styled UI
Guiding users back to valid pages after broken links
Landing page for dead or removed routes
ai_summary: A clean, flat-design 404 error page featuring an SVG illustration with a centered layout. Displays friendly error messaging with navigation links to redirect users. Uses flexbox for perfect centering and responsive sizing for desktop and mobile platforms. Minimalist visual style with subtle gray-toned graphics suitable for any SaaS or web application.
